text:
Tecno21 - Openservices
We provide setup and support on FreeBSD, FreeBSD and Linux. We have 10+ years experience with OpenSource on corporate and SMB customers. Development of custom applications (C/C++/Java/C#), network infrastructure design, security, audit and smartcard solutions. Contact: email or by phone +55 (11) 3825-2472.
